description: Composed schema generated from all installed plugins. Artifact types, relationship types, and validation constraints sourced from plugin manifests.

demoted_date.description: ISO date when the rule was demoted to inactive

demoted_reason.description: Why the rule was demoted (e.g. enforced by orqa lsp schema validation)

replaced_by.description: What now covers this rule (e.g. orqa lsp, pre-commit hook)

stability_threshold.description: Sessions with zero violations before the rule is safe to delete

stability_count.description: Current count of consecutive clean sessions since demotion

thinking-mode.description: Prompt classification mode this knowledge artifact represents. Used by the thinking-mode classifier to match prompts to behavioral context.

priority-rules.description: Rule categories prioritised when this thinking mode is active. Used by the prompt injector to select relevant behavioral rules.

relationshipTypes.label: Upholds
relationshipTypes.description: Pillar supports the vision

relationshipTypes.label: Grounded
relationshipTypes.description: Idea or epic anchored to a foundational principle

relationshipTypes.label: Benefits
relationshipTypes.description: Idea serves a target persona

relationshipTypes.label: Crystallises
relationshipTypes.description: Idea crystallises into an architecture decision

relationshipTypes.label: Spawns
relationshipTypes.description: Idea spawns an investigation

relationshipTypes.label: Drives
relationshipTypes.description: Decision motivates a body of delivery work

relationshipTypes.label: Governs
relationshipTypes.description: Decision establishes governance — leads into the learning loop

relationshipTypes.label: Enforces
relationshipTypes.description: Rule enforces a decision

relationshipTypes.label: Codifies
relationshipTypes.description: Rule codifies a lesson into enforceable governance

relationshipTypes.label: Informs
relationshipTypes.description: Research findings or wireframes inform a decision, research thread, or epic

relationshipTypes.label: Teaches
relationshipTypes.description: Lesson teaches a future decision

relationshipTypes.label: Guides
relationshipTypes.description: Research guides a body of delivery work

relationshipTypes.label: Cautions
relationshipTypes.description: Lesson cautions a body of delivery work

relationshipTypes.label: Serves
relationshipTypes.description: Agent is accountable to a foundational principle

relationshipTypes.label: Employs
relationshipTypes.description: Agent employs a knowledge capability

relationshipTypes.label: Documents
relationshipTypes.description: Document describes an artifact for human reference

relationshipTypes.label: Synchronised With
relationshipTypes.description: Paired content kept in sync — agent-facing and human-facing versions

relationshipTypes.label: Merged Into
relationshipTypes.description: Artifacts consolidated — multiple ideas or research threads become one

relationshipTypes.label: Revises
relationshipTypes.description: Pivot revises a foundational artifact

relationshipTypes.label: Promoted To
relationshipTypes.description: Lesson promoted to an enforceable rule

relationshipTypes.label: Evolves To
relationshipTypes.description: Discovery idea evolves into a research investigation

relationshipTypes.label: Pivots
relationshipTypes.description: Vision triggers a strategic pivot

relationshipTypes.label: Hands Off To
relationshipTypes.description: Discovery decision hands off to a planning idea for implementation scoping

relationshipTypes.label: References
relationshipTypes.description: Planning decision or doc references discovery research or another doc for context

relationshipTypes.label: Implements
relationshipTypes.description: Planning decision implements through an epic (cross-stage to implementation)

relationshipTypes.label: Visualises
relationshipTypes.description: Wireframe visualises a planning decision

relationshipTypes.label: Realises
relationshipTypes.description: Idea realised through delivery work

relationshipTypes.label: Yields
relationshipTypes.description: Task yields a lesson learned

relationshipTypes.label: Addresses
relationshipTypes.description: Task or epic addresses a lesson or implementation finding

relationshipTypes.label: Delivers
relationshipTypes.description: Task delivers work to an epic

statusRules.description: Epic moves to review when all delivering tasks are completed

relationshipTypes.label: Fulfils
relationshipTypes.description: Epic fulfils a milestone checkpoint

statusRules.description: Milestone moves to review when all fulfilling epics are completed

relationshipTypes.label: Depends On
relationshipTypes.description: Task or epic cannot proceed until dependency is completed

statusRules.description: Task is blocked when any dependency is not yet completed
Task is unblocked when all dependencies are completed
